short_text: Binura Fernando to Simi Singh, byes, 2 runs, a couple of byes to end the innings - short of a length and following Singh
full_text: Binura Fernando to Simi Singh, byes, 2 runs, a couple of byes to end the innings - short of a length and following Singh as he shuffled across, he swung and missed, they were always going for the bye, Kusal Mendis has a shy and misses it by a long way, McCarthy had overrun, but they turn back for the second - McCarthy is running so wide that he nearly reached cover on thye followthrough, the throw is at the bowler's end who fumbles and can't gather the throw - letting McCarthy off

short_text: Binura Fernando to Simi Singh, , , low full-toss from Binura, Singh shuffled right across, watches it closely and then l
full_text: Binura Fernando to Simi Singh, , , low full-toss from Binura, Singh shuffled right across, watches it closely and then laps it over short fine for a boundary

short_text: Binura Fernando to McCarthy, 1 run, fuller length delivery outside off, McCarthy prods across and can't beat mid-off wit
full_text: Binura Fernando to McCarthy, 1 run, fuller length delivery outside off, McCarthy prods across and can't beat mid-off with the drive

short_text: Binura Fernando to Simi Singh, 1 run, a high full-toss, but its below waist and is deemed as a fair ball, miscued down t
full_text: Binura Fernando to Simi Singh, 1 run, a high full-toss, but its below waist and is deemed as a fair ball, miscued down to long-on for a single

short_text: Binura Fernando to Simi Singh, no run, another wide yorker from Binura - Singh shimmies down the pitch and misses once a
full_text: Binura Fernando to Simi Singh, no run, another wide yorker from Binura - Singh shimmies down the pitch and misses once again

short_text: Binura Fernando to Simi Singh, no run, yorker length delivery outside off, Singh runs down the pitch and can't lay bat o
full_text: Binura Fernando to Simi Singh, no run, yorker length delivery outside off, Singh runs down the pitch and can't lay bat on the ball

full_text: Hasaranga to Simi Singh, 1 run, loopy delivery on the leg-stump line, swept behind square on the on-side for a single

full_text: Hasaranga to McCarthy, 1 run, tossed up just outside off, driven towards cover who fumbles and allows a single

short_text: Hasaranga to Mark Adair, Caught by Karunaratne!! They're offering catching practice to Karunaratne in the deep. Nicely b
full_text: Hasaranga to Mark Adair, Caught by Karunaratne!! They're offering catching practice to Karunaratne in the deep. Nicely bowled by Hasaranga - slowed down the pace and made the batter drag the shovel down to the on-side - Adair came down the pitch and he did strike it cleanly, but once again he was going for the longer boundary and can't clear deep mid-wicket.

short_text: Hasaranga to Simi Singh, 1 run, flighted delivery on middle and leg, worked away behind square on the on-side for a sing
full_text: Hasaranga to Simi Singh, 1 run, flighted delivery on middle and leg, worked away behind square on the on-side for a single

short_text: Hasaranga to Simi Singh, no run, , slower leg-break on off, drifts in and then turns away, drags Singh forward into the
full_text: Hasaranga to Simi Singh, no run, , slower leg-break on off, drifts in and then turns away, drags Singh forward into the drive and beats him on the outside edge

short_text: Hasaranga to Delany, Caught by Karunaratne!! A meaty slog-sweep, but Delany has holed out to deep mid-wicket. You can't
full_text: Hasaranga to Delany, Caught by Karunaratne!! A meaty slog-sweep, but Delany has holed out to deep mid-wicket. You can't keep Hasaranga out of action for a long while - this was nicely tossed up on off, Delany was shaping for the big slog-sweep, didn't get hold of the shot, was aiming the bigger boundary - Karunaratne was under it, juggled once and then grabs it on the rebound.

short_text: Binura Fernando to Tector, Caught by Shanaka!! A dolly to mid-off and Tector's lumbered innings comes to an end. Ran dow
full_text: Binura Fernando to Tector, Caught by Shanaka!! A dolly to mid-off and Tector's lumbered innings comes to an end. Ran down the pitch, got a juicy full-toss and all he could do was to mishit it straight down mid-off's throat. Came off the toe-end, Shanaka didn't spot it at first, but he has plenty of time to run forward and complete the catch.

short_text: Binura Fernando to Delany, 1 run, full-toss from Binura, punched down to long-on for a single
full_text: Binura Fernando to Delany, 1 run, full-toss from Binura, punched down to long-on for a single

short_text: Binura Fernando to Delany, , , handy boundary for Delany - on a good length and angling across the right-hander, Delany
full_text: Binura Fernando to Delany, , , handy boundary for Delany - on a good length and angling across the right-hander, Delany swings across the line, gets a thick edge and has enough to loop over Kumara at short third

short_text: Binura Fernando to Delany, 2 runs, edged, and the fielder at short third man does well to get a hand onto it, saved a co
full_text: Binura Fernando to Delany, 2 runs, edged, and the fielder at short third man does well to get a hand onto it, saved a couple of runs - the cutter and Delany got a thick edge on the drive, past the keeper and to the left of Kumara at short third man

full_text: Binura Fernando to Tector, 1 run, fuller length delivery on off, punched in front of mid-off and Tector's off for a quick single

full_text: Binura Fernando to Delany, 1 run, slower ball just outside off, dropped in front of backward point for a single

short_text: M Theekshana to Dockrell, Bowled!! Ireland keep losing wickets - this was tossed up on off and middle, flicked with the
full_text: M Theekshana to Dockrell, Bowled!! Ireland keep losing wickets - this was tossed up on off and middle, flicked with the wrists and kept going with the angle, Dockrell backed away on the lofted drive, played down the wrong line, the ball clips the top of off, the zing bails light up and Theekshana has a second wicket.

full_text: Karunaratne to Tector, , , on a good length and just outside off, Tector shimmies down the pitch, high elbow and a straight bat as he lifts the drive over mid-off, bounces away to the ropes in a hurry

full_text: Karunaratne to Dockrell, 1 run, on a good length and angling into the pads, Dockrell backs away on the flick, gets an inside edge onto the pads and it rolls towards backward point, there's a shy at the bowler's end and an unnecessay single is conceded

full_text: Dhananjaya to Dockrell, 1 run, flighted delivery on off, chipped uppishly and down towards long-on, bounces in front of the fielder at long-on

full_text: Dhananjaya to Tector, 1 run, good cricket all around, dragged short and Tector nasiled the pull, looked like he had split the gap between the two fielders in the deep, but Hasaranga got across, stopped it with his right-hand and keeps them down to a single

short_text: Karunaratne to Campher, Caught by Asalanka!! Chamika Karunaratne is ecstatic with his celebration! He's very animated as
full_text: Karunaratne to Campher, Caught by Asalanka!! Chamika Karunaratne is ecstatic with his celebration! He's very animated as the plan has worked to perfection. Short outside off again, Campher tries to cut but this time it is straight into the hands of the backward point fielder. Ireland in a spot of bother now!

full_text: Karunaratne to Tector, 1 run, fuller on the pads, chipped uppishly towards long-on

short_text: Dhananjaya to Stirling, Caught by Rajapaksa!! Now the wicket!! This was pushed fuller and wider, Stirling shuffled away
full_text: Dhananjaya to Stirling, Caught by Rajapaksa!! Now the wicket!! This was pushed fuller and wider, Stirling shuffled away to smash it over the fielder at widish long-off for a maximum. Didn't get the timing and picks out Rajapaksa who moved ground quickly to his left to hold onto a solid, low grab.

short_text: Dhananjaya to Stirling, , DDS from round the wicket, gets one short in the swinging arc for Stirling. The Irish opener s
full_text: Dhananjaya to Stirling, , DDS from round the wicket, gets one short in the swinging arc for Stirling. The Irish opener says thank you very much as he splits deep mid-wicket and deep backward square leg with a pull

full_text: Karunaratne to Stirling, 1 run, full on off, Stirling lifts his drive straight as an arrow down the ground. Kumara from long-on gets under it but drops a dolly. Signals saying he was unsighted by the sun! Could be a costly drop...

full_text: Hasaranga to Tector, 2 runs, half tracker on off, reverse swept to the left of short third for a couple of runs. A positive start against Sri Lanka's best bowler!

full_text: Karunaratne to Stirling, , shot of the innings! Short outside off, Stirling opens his body up to upper cut this into the big boundary over point for a maximum. The power he managed to generate was incredible

full_text: Karunaratne to Stirling, , slower delivery on middle. Stirling reads it off the hands and tonks it over the bowlers head to the long-on boundary

full_text: Karunaratne to Stirling, no run, length ball on middle, Stirling dances down to cut towards backward point

full_text: M Theekshana to Tucker, Bowled!! Round his legs! Lorcan Tucker was getting way too often and Theekshana has his number. Bowls the flicker that takes an edge off his pads onto middle stump, Ireland lose two within the powerplay.

full_text: Kumara to Stirling, , attempted yorker again, falls slightly short. Stirling drives it hard down the ground and mid-off is too wide to have a say at this one. Races away to the fence!

full_text: Kumara to Tucker, no run, fuller length and goes over the leg stump as Lorcan Tucker attempts another ramp shot. No connection this time

full_text: Binura Fernando to Stirling, 1 run, Stirling shuffled away to try and score a big drive over covers! Fernando followed him and the batter adjusts to block this towards backward square for a single

short_text: Kumara to Balbirnie, Bowled!! Knocked over!! Too audacious and too early from Balbirnie, and he pays the price. Full and
full_text: Kumara to Balbirnie, Bowled!! Knocked over!! Too audacious and too early from Balbirnie, and he pays the price. Full and straight from Lahiru Kumara, Balbirnie attempted a ramp over short fine after shuffling closer. He exposed all his stumps in the process and it was target practice then for Kumara who is too good for the Irish captain.

full_text: Simi Singh to Kusal Mendis, , Sri Lanka and Kusal Mendis end this in style. Floaty offbreak on the stumps, Mendis swings the sweep miles over deep square leg. I0$ and that will fatten Sri Lanka's NRR and severely dent Ireland's

full_text: Joshua Little to Dhananjaya, 1 run, short at Dhananjaya, who pulls but miscues it, just in front and wide of short fine-leg. Dhananjaya too is off the mark in streaky fashion
